debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · rintro ⟨X, rfl⟩ y ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    exact x.2
  · intro h
    use {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      exact ⟨⟨y, h hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩
failed_attempts:
by
  apply set_ext; intro S
  constructor
  · intro ⟨X, hS⟩; rw [← hS]
    intro y ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    exact x.2
  · intro hS
    use {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply set_ext; intro y
    constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      exact ⟨⟨y, hS hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_extensionality; intro S
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨X, rfl⟩ y ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
    exact x.2
  · intro hS
    use {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply set_extensionality; intro y
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      use ⟨y, hS y hy⟩
      exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_ext; intro Y
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h
    rw [← hX]
    intro y hy
    obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := hy
    exact x.property
  · intro h
    use {x : A | x.val ∈ Y}
    apply set_ext; intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro hy
      obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := hy
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      use ⟨y, h hy⟩
      exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_ext; intro S; apply Iff.intro
  · rintro ⟨X, rfl⟩ y ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact x.property

    · rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact hx
    · intro hy; use ⟨y, h hy⟩; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨X, hS⟩; rw [← hS]

  · intro h; use {x | x.val ∈ S}
    apply set_ext; intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact hx
    · intro hy; use ⟨y, h hy⟩; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_ext; intro S; apply Iff.intro
  · intro h; obtain X hX from h; rewrite [← hX]
    intro y hy; obtain x hx from hy; rewrite [← hx.right]; exact x.2
  · intro h; apply exists_intro {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply set_ext; intro y; apply Iff.intro
    · intro hy; obtain x hx from hy; rewrite [← hx.right]; exact hx.left
    · intro hy; apply exists_intro ⟨y, h hy⟩; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨X, hX⟩
    rw [← hX]

  · intro hS

    · intro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact hx
    · intro hy; use ⟨y, hS hy⟩; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

    · intro hy

  · intro ⟨X, hX⟩; rw [← hX]; intro y ⟨x, _, rfl⟩; exact x.property
  · intro h; exists {x | x.val ∈ S}; apply set_ext; intro y; apply Iff.intro
    · intro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact hx
    · intro hy; exists ⟨y, h hy⟩; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply Set.ext; intro Y
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨X, hX⟩

    intro y ⟨x, hx, hxy⟩
    rw [← hxy]
    exact x.2
  · intro hY
    exists {x : A | x.val ∈ Y}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro ⟨x, hx, hxy⟩
      rw [← hxy]; exact hx
    · intro hy
      exists ⟨y, hY hy⟩
      apply And.intro
      · exact hy
      · rfl

    · intro h'

    · intro hy; use ⟨y, h hy⟩; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩
